name: l402-kit-mcp
description: MCP server that enables AI agents to autonomously pay for and call L402-protected APIs using Bitcoin Lightning. Provides tools for invoice lookup, payment, and credential caching.

L402_PROVIDER.description: Lightning provider to use: 'blink' (managed, zero-config) or 'lnd'/'cln' (sovereign)

L402_BLINK_API_KEY.description: Blink API key for managed Lightning payments (get free at blink.sv)

L402_BUDGET_SATS.description: Maximum sats the agent can spend per session (default: 1000)
